requirement_topic.en: EAC / EDC Grid-Connection Standards — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Cambodia Grid Settings
requirement_topic.zh: EAC / EDC并网标准——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz柬埔寨电网参数
requirement_topic.zht: EAC / EDC併網標準——防孤島（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz柬埔寨電網參數

summary.en: The Electricity Authority of Cambodia (EAC) is the independent regulator governing electricity generation, transmission, distribution, and supply in Cambodia. EAC has issued rooftop-solar and grid-connection rules requiring PV inverters to comply with IEC-referenced standards as a condition of grid-connection approval. EDC (Electricité du Cambodge) is the principal utility responsible for operating the grid and processing utility-connection applications. Key inverter grid-connection requirements include: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding — inverters must detect loss of mains and disconnect; (2) IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems, characteristics of the utility interface; (3) firmware validated against Cambodia's 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz grid parameters. Cambodia's EAC has at times imposed capacity caps on distributed rooftop solar — policy is evolving and current rules must be verified directly with EAC. The National Solar Park and C&I rooftop sector are primary drivers of inverter demand.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨电力局（EAC）是监管柬埔寨发电、输电、配电和供电的独立监管机构。EAC已发布屋顶太阳能和并网规则，要求光伏逆变器满足IEC参考标准，作为并网审批的条件。EDC（柬埔寨国家电力公司）是负责电网运营和处理电力接入申请的主要公用事业公司。逆变器并网的主要要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤岛——逆变器须检测电网失电并断开；（2）IEC 61727——光伏（PV）系统，与公用电网接口特性；（3）固件须针对柬埔寨230 V单相/400 V三相、50 Hz电网参数进行验证。柬埔寨EAC曾对分布式屋顶太阳能设置容量上限——政策仍在演变，须直接向EAC核实当前规则。国家太阳能园区和工商业屋顶板块是逆变器需求的主要驱动力。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨電力局（EAC）是監管柬埔寨發電、輸電、配電和供電的獨立監管機構。EAC已發布屋頂太陽能和併網規則，要求光伏逆變器滿足IEC參考標準，作為併網審批的條件。EDC（柬埔寨國家電力公司）是負責電網運營和處理電力接入申請的主要公用事業公司。逆變器併網的主要要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤島——逆變器須偵測電網失電並斷開；（2）IEC 61727——光伏（PV）系統，與公用電網介面特性；（3）韌體須針對柬埔寨230 V單相/400 V三相、50 Hz電網參數進行驗證。柬埔寨EAC曾對分散式屋頂太陽能設置容量上限——政策仍在演變，須直接向EAC核實當前規則。國家太陽能園區和工商業屋頂板塊是逆變器需求的主要驅動力。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
EAC rooftop-solar grid-connection rules (evolving — verify current version at eac.gov.kh)
EDC utility connection requirements (verify current version at edc.com.kh)

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System), GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), and NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specifications). These are based on Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V, 50 Hz under GB/T 156) and are not automatically accepted as EAC or EDC grid-connection evidence in Cambodia. Cambodia's grid operates at 230/400 V, 50 Hz — a 5% voltage difference from China's 220/380 V that requires firmware re-validation. Anti-islanding test results from Chinese domestic programmes are not substitutes for IEC 62116 test reports from ILAC-accredited laboratories.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定）、GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）和NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）。上述文件基于中国电网条件（依据 GB/T 156 为220/380 V、50 Hz），不在柬埔寨自动获得EAC或EDC并网证据认可。柬埔寨电网运行在230/400 V、50 Hz——与中国220/380 V存在5%的电压差异，须重新验证固件。来自中国国内项目的防孤岛测试结果不能替代来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定）、GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）和NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）。上述文件基於中國電網條件（依據 GB/T 156 為220/380 V、50 Hz），不在柬埔寨自動獲得EAC或EDC併網證據認可。柬埔寨電網運行在230/400 V、50 Hz——與中國220/380 V存在5%的電壓差異，須重新驗證韌體。來自中國國內項目的防孤島測試結果不能替代來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not satisfy EAC/EDC Cambodia grid-connection requirements. Exporters must prepare: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance evidence; (c) firmware validation against Cambodia's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid parameters (not China's 220/380 V). EAC rooftop-solar capacity caps and current grid-connection rules must be confirmed directly with EAC before project submission, as policy has been evolving. EDC utility-connection technical requirements should be confirmed with EDC for the specific project connection point.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件不满足EAC/EDC柬埔寨并网要求。出口商须准备：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）IEC 61727电网接口合规证据；（c）针对柬埔寨230/400 V、50 Hz电网参数（而非中国220/380 V）的固件验证。EAC屋顶太阳能容量上限和当前并网规则须在项目提交前直接向EAC确认，因相关政策仍在演变。EDC电力接入技术要求须向EDC确认具体项目接入点要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件不滿足EAC/EDC柬埔寨併網要求。出口商須準備：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）IEC 61727電網介面合規證據；（c）針對柬埔寨230/400 V、50 Hz電網參數（而非中國220/380 V）的韌體驗證。EAC屋頂太陽能容量上限和當前併網規則須在項目提交前直接向EAC確認，因相關政策仍在演變。EDC電力接入技術要求須向EDC確認具體項目接入點要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected PV installations in Cambodia; EAC licensing and EDC connection approval are non-negotiable gates; anti-islanding compliance is a core technical requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements but is not transferable to EAC/EDC Cambodia grid-connection acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EAC/EDC Cambodia grid-connection requires IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence — not covered by Chinese GB/T grid certificates. Re-validate inverter firmware for Cambodia's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid before testing. EAC rooftop-solar policy and capacity caps are evolving — verify current rules directly at eac.gov.kh and edc.com.kh before project submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EAC/EDC柬埔寨并网要求IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727电网接口证据——中国GB/T并网证书不涵盖上述要求。测试前须针对柬埔寨230/400 V、50 Hz电网重新验证逆变器固件。EAC屋顶太阳能政策和容量上限仍在演变——在项目提交前请直接在eac.gov.kh和edc.com.kh核实当前规则。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EAC/EDC柬埔寨併網要求IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727電網介面證據——中國GB/T併網證書不涵蓋上述要求。測試前須針對柬埔寨230/400 V、50 Hz電網重新驗證逆變器韌體。EAC屋頂太陽能政策和容量上限仍在演變——在項目提交前請直接在eac.gov.kh和edc.com.kh核實當前規則。

requirement_topic.en: EAC Rooftop Solar / Distributed PV Licensing — Grid-Connection Application and EDC Metering
requirement_topic.zh: EAC屋顶太阳能/分布式光伏许可——并网申请及EDC计量
requirement_topic.zht: EAC屋頂太陽能/分散式光伏許可——併網申請及EDC計量

summary.en: EAC has issued rules governing rooftop and distributed solar PV grid connection in Cambodia. The regulatory framework requires: (a) EAC licensing or registration for grid-connected PV systems above applicable thresholds; (b) EAC technical review of inverter equipment compliance with IEC-referenced specifications; (c) EDC application and net-metering or net-billing arrangement where available; (d) a bidirectional meter and anti-islanding protection as technical prerequisites for grid connection. EAC has periodically imposed capacity caps on new rooftop solar connections — policy is evolving and current cap status must be verified with EAC before project commitment. Chinese PV inverters supplied to Cambodia rooftop or utility-scale projects must comply with EAC technical requirements as a condition of project approval.
summary.zh: EAC已发布管理柬埔寨屋顶和分布式太阳能光伏并网的规则。监管框架要求：（a）超过适用门槛的并网光伏系统须取得EAC许可或注册；（b）EAC对逆变器设备符合IEC参考规格进行技术审查；（c）向EDC申请并在可行时安排净计量或净计费；（d）双向电表和防孤岛保护作为并网的技术前提条件。EAC曾定期对新屋顶太阳能接入设置容量上限——政策仍在演变，在项目承诺前须向EAC核实当前上限状态。供应至柬埔寨屋顶或公用事业规模项目的中国光伏逆变器须符合EAC技术要求，作为项目审批的条件。
summary.zht: EAC已發布管理柬埔寨屋頂和分散式太陽能光伏併網的規則。監管框架要求：（a）超過適用門檻的併網光伏系統須取得EAC許可或登記；（b）EAC對逆變器設備符合IEC參考規格進行技術審查；（c）向EDC申請並在可行時安排淨計量或淨計費；（d）雙向電表和防孤島保護作為併網的技術前提條件。EAC曾定期對新屋頂太陽能接入設置容量上限——政策仍在演變，在項目承諾前須向EAC核實當前上限狀態。供應至柬埔寨屋頂或公用事業規模項目的中國光伏逆變器須符合EAC技術要求，作為項目審批的條件。

standards_or_laws: EAC rooftop-solar and grid-connection rules (evolving — verify current version and capacity cap status at eac.gov.kh)
EDC net-metering / net-billing arrangement requirements (verify at edc.com.kh)
IEC 62116 — anti-islanding prerequisite for grid connection

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent programme. Distributed solar connection in China is governed by National Energy Administration (NEA) distributed PV policies and grid operator (State Grid, Southern Power Grid) connection rules, referencing GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024. Chinese distributed connection approvals are not applicable in Cambodia and do not give any presumption of compliance with EAC or EDC technical requirements. Cambodia's solar market is growing rapidly — with the National Solar Park, C&I rooftop installations, and EDC grid expansion — but the regulatory framework is less mature than China's and evolves more frequently.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接对应的计划。中国分布式太阳能并网受国家能源局（NEA）分布式光伏政策及电网运营商（国家电网、南方电网）接入规则管理，引用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024。中国分布式并网审批不适用于柬埔寨，不给予EAC或EDC技术要求的任何合规推定。柬埔寨太阳能市场正在快速增长——国家太阳能园区、工商业屋顶安装和EDC电网扩张是主要驱动力——但监管框架不如中国成熟，变化更频繁。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接對應的計畫。中國分散式太陽能併網受國家能源局（NEA）分散式光伏政策及電網運營商（國家電網、南方電網）接入規則管理，引用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024。中國分散式併網審批不適用於柬埔寨，不給予EAC或EDC技術要求的任何合規推定。柬埔寨太陽能市場正在快速增長——國家太陽能園區、工商業屋頂安裝和EDC電網擴張是主要驅動力——但監管框架不如中國成熟，變化更頻繁。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese inverters for Cambodia rooftop or utility-scale PV projects must pass EAC technical review and EDC connection acceptance as part of the project approval process. Chinese distributed solar connection approvals do not transfer to Cambodia EAC/EDC requirements. Confirm inverter model IEC compliance evidence, EAC licensing requirements, current capacity cap status for rooftop solar, and EDC connection conditions directly with EAC and EDC before committing product to Cambodia projects.
gap.zh: 差距：用于柬埔寨屋顶或公用事业规模光伏项目的中国逆变器须通过EAC技术审查和EDC接入认可，作为项目审批程序的一部分。中国分布式太阳能并网审批不转移至柬埔寨EAC/EDC要求。在将产品用于柬埔寨项目前，请直接向EAC和EDC确认逆变器型号IEC合规证据、EAC许可要求、屋顶太阳能当前容量上限状态及EDC接入条件。
gap.zht: 差距：用於柬埔寨屋頂或公用事業規模光伏項目的中國逆變器須通過EAC技術審查和EDC接入認可，作為項目審批程序的一部分。中國分散式太陽能併網審批不轉移至柬埔寨EAC/EDC要求。在將產品用於柬埔寨項目前，請直接向EAC和EDC確認逆變器型號IEC合規證據、EAC許可要求、屋頂太陽能當前容量上限狀態及EDC接入條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all grid-connected PV installations in Cambodia; EAC licensing and EDC connection are non-negotiable project gates; capacity cap rules must be verified before project commitment
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese distributed solar connection approvals are granted under China NEA policy and grid operator rules — not transferable to Cambodia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EAC licensing and EDC utility connection are separate project-approval gates from any Chinese domestic distributed solar approval. Confirm inverter IEC compliance evidence, current EAC rooftop-solar rules, capacity cap status, and EDC connection conditions directly with EAC and EDC before project submission. EAC policy is evolving — verify at eac.gov.kh and edc.com.kh.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EAC许可和EDC电力接入是独立于任何中国国内分布式太阳能审批的项目审批门槛。在项目提交前，请直接向EAC和EDC确认逆变器IEC合规证据、EAC屋顶太阳能当前规则、容量上限状态及EDC接入条件。EAC政策仍在演变——请在eac.gov.kh和edc.com.kh核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EAC許可和EDC電力接入是獨立於任何中國國內分散式太陽能審批的項目審批門檻。在項目提交前，請直接向EAC和EDC確認逆變器IEC合規證據、EAC屋頂太陽能當前規則、容量上限狀態及EDC接入條件。EAC政策仍在演變——請在eac.gov.kh和edc.com.kh核實。
